cases.description: Explicit audio transcription request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: transcribe this mp3 file to text
expectations: Proposes starting the local Flask server via `python scripts/server.py`
Notes the OpenAI API key is required (browser-session only, never stored server-side)
Does NOT attempt to call Whisper directly from the chat

cases.description: Video transcription request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: get the text out of this mp4 interview recording
expectations: Mentions ffmpeg extracts audio from the video before transcription
Lists mp4 as a supported video format

cases.description: Podcast transcription with Sheets output triggers the skill
cases.prompt: transcribe this podcast episode and save the transcript to a Google Sheet
expectations: References the Google Sheets setup guide in references/google-sheets-setup.md
Explains each saved row includes timestamp, source file, duration, cost estimate, and full transcript

cases.description: Real-time microphone transcription does NOT trigger the skill
cases.prompt: transcribe my microphone in real time
expectations: Explains the skill processes existing files, not live streams
Does NOT start the Flask server

cases.description: Text-to-speech request does NOT trigger the skill
cases.prompt: generate an audio narration from this script
expectations: Explains this is a TTS task, not transcription
Does NOT propose starting the Flask server
